sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83922" key="plohto/kos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλοητόκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n83922.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">producing navigation,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ζέφυρος</foreign> dub. l. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.6</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Satyr.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
